short_video_script: I was hesitant to post videos on LinkedIn, fearing negative comments and being judged. I thought my knowledge might seem limited. But I started learning from scratch, doing project-based learning, and now I've got a little reach on LinkedIn. My message is: don't be afraid, just start.

transcript.speaker: interviewer
transcript.text: What was going through your mind when you first considered posting videos on LinkedIn two years ago?
transcript.reason: Inviting the user to share their initial thoughts and feelings about the topic

transcript.speaker: interviewer
transcript.text: Can you give me a specific moment when you felt hesitant or unsure about posting a video on LinkedIn?

transcript.speaker: interviewer
transcript.text: What was it about creating a video on Flask that made you feel unsure or hesitant about sharing it on LinkedIn?

transcript.speaker: interviewer
transcript.text: Let me try that a different way... What's the worst that could have happened if you had posted that video on Flask back in your 2nd year of college?
transcript.reason: Gently rephrasing the question to help the user open up about their fears and concerns

transcript.speaker: interviewer
transcript.text: That's a very common fear - what did you think people's negative comments would say about you or your abilities?

transcript.speaker: interviewer
transcript.text: Did you feel like your knowledge being perceived as limited would reflect poorly on you as a professional, or was there something else at stake for you?

transcript.speaker: interviewer
transcript.text: That's a very honest way to put it - can you tell me what finally changed for you, making you feel more comfortable about posting videos on LinkedIn now?
